source_title: Sandra Crucianelli — Periodismo de Base de Datos (blog/tutorials)
author: Sandra Crucianelli

extracts.extract: It offers the audience the supporting documents on which the work was based, generally shared from an external platform.
extracts.chapter: Three Basic Hallmarks of Database Journalism

extracts.extract: The reporter explains their methods, so that their work withstands critical review; this means that if a reader or another journalist wanted to retrace the same steps using the same documents, they would reach the same conclusion or a different one, should they be able to refute it or find other angles.
extracts.chapter: Three Basic Hallmarks of Database Journalism

extracts.extract: It is team work: alongside a data analyst, a programmer, and an interactive-visualization designer. The inclusion of a developer is vital, especially if you want to design interactive news applications.
